special_mechanics.name: Blaster Weapon
special_mechanics.description: Bombs ground installations and vehicles with reticle aiming system

special_mechanics.name: Difficulty Scaling
special_mechanics.description: Game progressively becomes more difficult as player skill increases; enemy types advance based on player performance. Destroying Zolback radars reverts to easier enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and development history but contain no quantitative physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision). Game is a shoot-em-up rather than character action platformer, making traditional movement parameters less relevant.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (Xevious NES/FDS page)
